working_on: Routine task AUDIT-HT (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — Hubs (top 10 by total degree, full-incident-edge review) + 3 syllabus traces (gettier_problem, modal_realism, social_contract_theory — substituted for absent free_speech per S-0081 gate). Twelfth and final routine evidence file. Top-10 hubs identified by inline parametric scan of 15 seed migrations: epistemic_justification (epistemology, deg 14), existence (metaphysics, 11), propositional_knowledge (epistemology, 11), causation (metaphysics, 10), physicalism (mind, 10), classical_logic (logic, 9), meaning (language, 9), normative_ethics (ethics, 9), vienna_circle_logical_positivism (service, 9), aristotelian_four_causes (service, 8). 96 unique incident edges (100 raw with 4 hub-pair-overlaps deduplicated) + 10 hub nodes + 3 syllabus traces under SEP-anchored review. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_and_traces.md. Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_and_traces.md as candidate-findings evidence for the AUDIT-HT scope: full-incident-edge review on each of the top-10 hub nodes by total degree (96 unique incident edges deduplicated from 100 raw across the 10 hubs; per-edge SEP-anchored verdict + reasoning + confidence per the verbatim master-plan prompt template) plus per-node review on the 10 hub nodes themselves (per master-plan AUDIT-HT row 'the 10 hub nodes themselves'; per the verbatim master-plan per-node prompt template) plus three diagnostic syllabus traces for gettier_problem (epistemology, BFS upstream prereq tree depth 4, 11 nodes), modal_realism (metaphysics, depth 5, 8 nodes), social_contract_theory (political philosophy substituted for absent free_speech per S-0081 gate, depth 3, 6 nodes) recording syllabus length / max depth / median depth / cross-domain hops along shortest paths / questionable-prereq nodes (cite SEP) / missing-prereq gaps the chain skips (cite SEP) / overall trace coherence verdict per master-plan §"Three diagnostic syllabus traces". No other tracked files modified beyond the operational allowlist (current.json, current_plan.md, auto_target.json status fields, register_state.json, archive/S-0117.json, ENGINE_LOG.md, STATE.md, HANDOFF.md).
